description: Tunnel scene geometry -- floor (rotation [-PI/2,0,0]), ceiling (rotation [PI/2,0,0]), left wall (rotation [0,PI/2,0]), right wall (rotation [0,-PI/2,0]), and end wall at deep Z. Camera pushes forward on Z-axis; walls undergo real perspective distortion receding to vanishing point. Per Sections 4.2 and 8.4. Addresses TC-05 (tunnel produces convincing depth).
notes: Tier 2 geometry. The signature 2.5D effect -- walls receding to vanishing point. Spec complete: 5 slots (floor, ceiling, left_wall, right_wall, end_wall), 8x6 cross-section, fog black near=15 far=50, companion tunnelSlotGuidance export for prompt metadata. Ceiling optional. Camera Z <= 5 constraint for compatible paths.
